name: designer_llm_prompt_closed
description: DIRECTIVE-DESIGNER GOAL-CLOSED: the round-1 designer system prompt MINUS the score-function disclosure parenthetical. Used by TUNER condition T-BLIND only. The goal-closed ablation answers: 'did the LLM induce the design objective on its own, or did the open prompt do that work?' Identical to designer_llm_prompt_open.txt apart from the dropped sentence.
diff_from_open: drops the parenthetical '(lower is better; the score penalises unfairness, draw rate, length deviation from 60 rounds, and money-flow deviation from $100/round)' from the score-target sentence
format: fenced ```json``` block with one object: {rationale, intervention, converged}
